posts.author: murali603
posts.community: Krsnaa Diagnostics - what is the diagnosis?
posts.text: Q4 updates: Rajasthan Pathology services started in Q1, we will see contribution from this in Q1 and fully implemented by Q2. Mangaement guidance only 100-150 Cr from this project in FY27 against the earliest expectation of 250-300 Cr. I feel they are very conservative, we may see good jump in FY28 from this projects. MH Radiology: 10 centers are under implementation phase and implemented in Q1FY27 out of 17 pending centers in this project, balance centers would be implemented in next quarters. There could be some margins hit in Q1 due to initial phase of rajasthan project, over all margins co…
